title: Do not prune images being used by a container
body:
Podman is not the only user of containers/storage, and as such we cannot rely on our database as the sole source of truth when pruning images. If images do not show as in use from Podman's perspective, but subsequently fail to remove because they are being used by a container, they're probably being used by Buildah or another c/storage client.

Since the images in question are in use, we shouldn't error on failure to prune them - we weren't supposed to prune them in the first place.

Fixes: #3983
